1.verse: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

2.verse: The earth was without form and void, and darkness was over the face of the deep.

3.verse: And God said, 'Let there be light,' and there was light.

4.verse: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him.

5.verse: Then the LORD God formed the man of dust from the ground and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life.

6.verse: The LORD God took the man and put him in the garden of Eden to work it and keep it.

7.verse: Then the LORD God said, 'It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a helper fit for him.'

8.verse: Now the serpent was more crafty than any other beast of the field that the LORD God had made.

9.verse: The LORD God called to the man and said to him, 'Where are you?'

10.verse: I will put enmity between you and the woman, and between your offspring and her offspring.

11.verse: The LORD said to Cain, 'Where is Abel your brother?' He said, 'I do not know; am I my brother's keeper?'

12.verse: Then the LORD said, 'I will blot out man whom I have created from the face of the land.'

13.verse: But Noah found favor in the eyes of the LORD.

14.verse: And God said to Noah, 'I have determined to make an end of all flesh.'

15.verse: Make yourself an ark of gopher wood. Make rooms in the ark, and cover it inside and out with pitch.

16.verse: For in seven days I will send rain on the earth forty days and forty nights.

17.verse: And the waters prevailed so mightily on the earth that all the high mountains under the whole heaven were covered.

18.verse: But God remembered Noah and all the beasts and all the livestock that were with him in the ark.

19.verse: I establish my covenant with you, that never again shall all flesh be cut off by the waters of the flood.

20.verse: I have set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and the earth.

101.verse: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

102.verse: The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us.

103.verse: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son.

104.verse: I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.

105.verse: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.

106.verse: I am the vine; you are the branches. If you remain in me and I in you, you will bear much fruit.

107.verse: Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one's life for one's friends.

108.verse: In this world you will have trouble. But take heart! I have overcome the world.

109.verse: Jesus said, 'Father, forgive them, for they do not know what they are doing.'

110.verse: Jesus said to her, 'I am the resurrection and the life. The one who believes in me will live, even though they die.'
